summary: Phase C - Task Engine fully tested end-to-end. Backend: 19/19 pytest cases passed (100%) covering CRUD, filters, stats, permissions (GET/PUT, enforcement, admin-only delete), auto-task creation on lead.created / lead transitions (nurturing, appointment, booking, recycle), auto-task on appointment.created with reminder 1h before, source_event idempotency dedup, and dashboard my_tasks counts. Frontend: /tasks page renders with all required data-testid hooks (stats-open/overdue/today/completed, filter-status/type/mine/overdue, tasks-table, tasks-add-btn, tasks-settings-btn). Create Task modal, Permissions modal, Complete modal all open and submit successfully. Snooze and Cancel action buttons present on every row. CRM lead detail panel renders LeadTasksPanel with lead-add-task button and listed tasks. Sidebar Tasks nav present.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 3026 lines (>700 threshold). Spec requires it to remain monolithic, but for future maintenance consider splitting into routers (tasks_router.py, leads_router.py).
TaskPermissionsUpdate model uses a mutable default (list) for allowed_roles - acceptable in Pydantic but worth noting.
Task delete endpoint correctly restricts to admins; manual task creation correctly returns 403 when role not in allowed list (super_admin override works).
Auto-task dedup via source_event with status filter {open, in_progress, snoozed} is correct - completed tasks allow re-creation if the same trigger fires again, which is desired behavior.
seed_data_creation: Tests created several TEST_-prefixed leads, tasks and appointments. Dedup test moved a lead through acquisition->nurturing twice to verify idempotency. Cleanup not performed (test data uses TEST_ prefix for easy identification).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase C task-engine behaviour verified: backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_tasks.py with 19 passing tests; frontend Playwright verification confirmed all data-testid hooks (tasks-page, stats-*, filter-*, tasks-table, tasks-add-btn, tasks-settings-btn, create-task-modal, task-title/type/priority/assign/due/submit, permissions-modal, perm-{role}, save-perms, complete-{id}, snooze-{id}, cancel-{id}, complete-modal, confirm-complete, lead-tasks-panel, lead-add-task). Sidebar Tasks entry present. CRM lead detail panel correctly renders LeadTasksPanel showing the auto-generated 'Hubungi lead baru' task. Indonesian UI strings ('Tambah Task', 'Permissions', 'Hari Ini', 'Selesai', 'Aktif', 'Hanya overdue', 'TERBUKA') present and correct.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration.
